---
title: "Dove In The Eagle’s Nest, The. 2 vols. By the author of  “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Dove In The Eagle’s Nest, The. 2 vols. By the author of  “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1866
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Cambridge and London: Macmillan and Company.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
